reviews.comment:
Mala atención en el local, parece que saludar  es de otra época. Y los sándwiches son una leyenda urbana, no venden.

(Translated by Google)
The service at this place is terrible; greeting people seems like a thing of the past. And the sandwiches are just a myth—they don't sell.
